title: Richard's Vanilla
description: QoL features, a beautifull shader and fully client-side and vanilla-like modpack, that's the new default way of playing Minecraft
body:
A simple modpack for you to enjoy :3

![Play like me](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1fc830666bb4dcbf9ca9c3dea4d09ffc6f750fd.jpeg)_**This is a fully client-side, vanilla-like modpack, with Complementary Shaders + Euphoria Patches, full of QoL and optimization mods. That's my new way to play Minecraft.**_

### Performance Mods
My modpack includes optimization mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), and [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) to make the game run smoothly on any system.

### Visuals
The modpack does not contain any resource packs, but it includes [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/project/HVnmMxH1) with [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/project/4H6sumDB) for a stunning gameplay, or [Miniature Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/miniature-shader) for a simpler and lighter look. Also, you can always disable shaders in-game if you prefer.

### LODs
[Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) is included in the modpack! You can enjoy a massive render distance boost via LOD (Level of Detail) chunks—without hurting performance too much.

### Compatibility
This modpack is fully client-side, so don't worry about multiplayer or servers—you're good to go!

### Vanilla-Like
I don't like straying too far from the "Minecrafty" feel, so the mods are vanilla-like—enhancing your experience without taking away the original vibe :3

### QoL Features
Most of the included non-optimization mods are QoL (Quality of Life) improvements/features. They enhance comfort and usability without drastically changing the core gameplay. (All of them run on client-side)

**You can always check the mod list on the [versions details](https://modrinth.com/modpack/richards-vanilla/versions) page. Feel free to download the modpack and tweak it to fit your playstyle!**

**Thank you for playing with my Vanilla Modpack. Have a great time doing so! :3**
